title: JS Bygone Vanilla
description: A lightweight modded Vanilla experience focusing on purposeful system improvements and atmospheric changes that evoke classic feelings and experiences. Meant to be played with friends.
body:
# Where old vibes meets new Minecraft



This modpack was created to bridge the gap between the Vanilla purists and the Mod enjoyers that I love to play the game with. My hope with publishing this modpack here on Modrinth is to make it more accessable not only to my friends, but also to all of you who may be seeking a similar experience as the one being curated here.




### This modpack 100% is created with the idea of playing on private servers with your friends.

- The first goal of the modpack was to leverage well-known engine optimization and improvement mods to help the game run better than Vanilla does.
  
- The second was to curate a client-side and server-side enviorment that was immersive and satisfying to use.
  
- The third was to very lightly and unobtrusively add to the base game itself. This is not done lightly, and the goal is to not spurn any Vanilla enthusiasts, while also giving seasoned modded players some extra goodies to utilize and enjoy.
  

**Full credit is given to all the amazing modders and developers who developed the mods used in this pack, your talent is immense and your love for the game is apparent.**

If you would like to report any issues or discuss the pack with me, feel free to join the discord.

I hope you all enjoy playing!
